title: rubus × oblongicarpus
intro: Rubus × oblongicarpus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a plant species that results from the cross between Rubus occidentalis and Rubus argutus. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its rich content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and anthocyanins. The health benefits of Rubus × oblongicarpus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Rubus × oblongicarpus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried powder for use in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
